message:
refactor(hooks): modernize hooks with React 18+ patterns

useLocalStorage.ts:
- Migrate from useState to useSyncExternalStore for better SSR
- Eliminates hydration mismatches with external state
- Improved key change handling with proper flush logic
- Add listener-based reactivity for cross-component sync
- Cleaner cleanup of debounced writes

useCountUp.ts:
- Minor cleanup and consistency improvements
- Better animation frame handling

useHaptic.ts:
- Refactor for cleaner API
- Improve type safety
- Better device capability detection
- Consolidated haptic patterns

These changes follow React 18+ best practices for external state
synchronization and improve reliability across SSR boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
